title: Emperor-4 beam tube

The '''Emperor-4 beam tube''' was a [[Beam tube/Legends|beam tube]] produced by [[Timms UniStar Armaments]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Description==
The Emperor-4 [[Beam tube/Legends|beam tube]] consisted of a two-handed weapon weighing over fifteen [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]], and a [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] [[Backpack/Legends|backpack]] massing over thirty kilograms. The backpack supplied the weapon with ammunition, but was only able to supply less than one hundred shots. The combined weight of the weapon and its backpack severely restricted the mobility of the [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] wielding it.<ref name="EGWT" />

The weapon's [[Particle beam/Legends|particle beam]] was generated and focused using four [[Energy cycler/Legends|energy cyclers]], twelve [[refinement tube]]s, and twelve low-grade [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]]. The internal refinement tubes were easily knocked out of alignment, and it required up to four [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to reconfigure them before the weapon was functional.<ref name="EGWT" />

The power system for the Emperor-4 was provided by the backpack power cell that included a recharge port and small [[refrigeration unit]] that was intended to keep the power cell operating at a safe temperature level. The system was attached to a heavy [[Blast vest/Legends|blast vest]]. This [[Kinetic Energy Vest|vest]] was covered in composite [[Ceramic/Legends|ceramics]] that were designed to absorb and dissipate the kinetic energy from projectile weapons. Other systems built into the vest included a reserve power cell, an internal [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] with a four-[[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] range, and an emergency [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] that could guide rescue personnel to the wearer.<ref name="EGWT" />

Firing the Emperor-4 took several [[Standard second|seconds]] as the weapon had to process enough energy to release a blast. The weapon had a maximum range of fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]], with an optimum range of twenty meters. 
The resultant beam generated a large amount of heat due to an inefficient energy conversion process. Twelve [[cooling motor]]s were installed in the weapon to protect the beam tube's sensitive internal components, which expelled the hot air out of the weapon and into the face of the soldier using it. The Emperor-4 was therefore uncomfortable to use.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
Due to the limitations of the Emperor-4, [[Squad/Legends|squads]] carrying them worked together, alternating their fire to allow them to cover each other during combat. The weapon's limited ammunition, combined with the near-constant need for recharging, led to squads to transporting [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]] on [[Hoversled/Legends|repulsorlift sleds]].<ref name="EGWT" />

==Sources==
